name: Mint Chocolate Chews
recipeIngredient: 3 packages Pep-O-Mint LIFE SAVERS (with holes, 0.35 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat together margarine and sugar until creamy.
2. Add melted chocolate and egg; continue beating until well combined.
3. Stir in buttermilk and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt until blended.
5. Stir in the Pep-O-Mint LIFE SAVERS with holes and chopped walnuts.
6. Cover and chill dough for at least 1 hour.
7. Drop dough by level tablespoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 8-10 minutes or until set.
9. Remove from sheets and let cool on wire racks.
Makes approximately 3 dozen cookies.
